scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsgo --noEmit && bun run check:browser-smoke && cd packages/web-ui && bun run check
scripts.version:patch: node scripts/bump-lockstep-version.mjs patch && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules bun.lock && bun install
scripts.version:minor: node scripts/bump-lockstep-version.mjs minor && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules bun.lock && bun install
scripts.version:major: node scripts/bump-lockstep-version.mjs major && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules bun.lock && bun install
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build && bun run check
scripts.publish: bun run prepublishOnly && for d in packages/tui packages/ai packages/agent packages/coding-agent packages/mom packages/pods packages/web-ui; do (cd "$d" && bun publish --access public); done
scripts.publish:dry: bun run prepublishOnly && for d in packages/tui packages/ai packages/agent packages/coding-agent packages/mom packages/pods packages/web-ui; do (cd "$d" && bun publish --access public --dry-run); done
